title: MatchSummaryTeam
description: Canonical scoreline-side summary for one team in a match header or live/result card.

teamId.description: Stable team identifier when the source provides one.

score.description: Current or final goals for this team.

xg.description: Team expected-goals total when the source provides it.

penalties.description: Penalty shootout or tiebreak goals when the source exposes them.

redCards.description: Team red-card count when the source exposes it.

sourceMeta.description: Provider-scoped metadata bag for provenance and advanced debugging. It must stay JSON-serializable, must not duplicate canonical top-level fields, and must not reinterpret raw provider semantics into fake cross-provider meaning.
